title: Patchouli Resource Patch - Arch
description:
A Patchouli Resource Patch fork.
Make Patchouli load book json from assets.
body:
# Patchouli Resource Patch - Arch This is a [Patchouli Resource Patch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/prp) fork that supports Fabric/Quilt/Forge 1.15.x~1.19.x . Since Patchouli changes to store books in `/data/`, external resource packages or data packages cannot overwrite the contents of those books. This mod uses mixin to change Patchouli's loading behavior so that it tries to load from assets before loading from data. **Useful only for non-English players or people who want to use the resource pack applied to Patchouli books.** About Patchouli for 1.15.x ~ 1.19.x : Some mods (like Apothesis) still put their manuals in the traditional data folder, and Patchouli won't even try to load from resource packs in this case, so this patch is still needed. About Patchouli for 1.20.x and above : Patchouli now only support resource packs mode! This mod is no longer required. ---
